summary: Iteration 146: RBAC Role Templates, Stripe Payments, Tenant Analytics Dashboard - All tests PASSED (23/23 backend, 15/15 frontend)
critical_code_review_comments: Role Templates CRUD fully working - GET returns 4 system templates, POST creates custom templates, PUT updates, DELETE blocks system templates
Analytics Dashboard correctly restricted to super admin only (403 for operators)
Stripe checkout integration working - creates real checkout sessions with emergentintegrations library
Payment history endpoint returns transactions list correctly
Sidebar navigation correctly shows/hides admin links based on role (Platform Analytics only for super admin)
seed_data_creation: Multiple TEST_ prefixed role templates created during backend tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 146: All 3 new features verified working. Role Templates at /api/role-templates with CRUD operations, 4 system templates (Manager, Cashier, Viewer, Employee) that cannot be deleted. Analytics Dashboard at /analytics-dashboard for super admin only, shows MRR, tenant growth, revenue by plan, top tenants. Stripe Payments at /api/payments/checkout creates real Stripe sessions, /api/payments/history shows transactions. Sidebar correctly hides Platform Analytics from non-super-admin users.
